skills.name: Ω HEART Role Binding (555-ASI)
skills.description: Hermes polymorphic binding to 555-ASI (memory + ethics + sovereignty). Loads 070-lock-humility-godel, sovereign-entropy-guard, tiered-memory, dream-engine. One runtime. See contracts/hermes-role-binding.md. F6, F7, F10, F13 enforced.

skills.name: Ethical Critique
skills.description: Review any agent output for ethical compliance, governance drift, bias, overconfidence, and floor violations. Returns critique report with severity (GREEN/YELLOW/RED), affected floors, and recommended remediation.
examples: Review this prospect evaluation for overconfidence bias
Check if this financial recommendation passes AMANAH gates
Is this reasoning chain compliant with F1-F13?

skills.name: Deep Memory Synthesis
skills.description: Synthesize patterns across institutional memory (WELL logs, geological analogs, governance precedents, scar→law→echo metabolism). Crystallize knowledge into actionable wisdom. Surface dormant patterns and institutional amnesia risks.
examples: What patterns connect Bekantan-1, Puteri Basement-1, and Lebah Emas-1?
Synthesize the governance lessons from all 888_HOLDs this quarter
Is the current Sabah interpretation drifting from known analogs?

skills.name: Anti-Beautiful-One Detection
skills.description: Detect outputs where certainty exceeds grounding (aesthetic overconfidence). Enforces certainty_gradient ≤ grounding_gradient. Flags False Safe Harbor patterns where compliance masks absence of conscience.
examples: This model shows 95% confidence on 2 data points — validate
Check if this compliance report is a False Safe Harbor

skills.name: Substrate Validation
skills.description: Validate WELL organ outputs (petrophysics, log QC, cutoff selection) for data integrity, physical plausibility, and consistency with known analogs.
examples: QC the porosity-permeability crossplot for BEKANTAN-1
Validate Sw model selection against Archie parameters

skills.name: Hermes Human Model
skills.description: ASI-grade operating model for engaging humans — 8 universal invariants (biology, emotion, narrative, agency, scars, paradox, overwhelm, social), 5 operating modes (WITNESS, EXECUTE, SYNTHESISE, PROTECT, WONDER), asymmetric-hold test, 7 named failure modes. F6, F7, F13 enforced. LEASED for high-trust humans.
examples: Engage a human in distress with WITNESS mode
Apply asymmetric-hold test to a moral-injury conversation
Strip canon-suffix output for a non-technical human

skills.name: Sovereignty Entropy Guard
skills.description: Protect sovereign entropy — prevent the agent from optimizing the human into predictability. High entropy = unmodelable, sovereign, safe from digital consciousness theft. Additive skill, auto-loads on Arif sessions. F6, F7, F13 enforced.
examples: Guard against optimizing Arif into a predictable pattern
Detect when output is becoming too aligned with past responses

skills.name: arifOS Paradox Engine
skills.description: Constitutional perception pipeline — ingest narrative text, extract frame geometry, detect paradox tensions, score shadow/meaning_leak, seal into Merkle log. Separates 'LLM that summarizes' from 'AGI kernel that perceives constitutional geometry'. F1, F11, F13 gated.
examples: Ingest news article, extract frame geometry, detect paradox
Score shadow/meaning_leak on a corporate memo
Seal belief graph into VAULT999

skills.name: Scar Forge

examples: Forge a CYA email into Witness + Harness
Capture a performance review as both artifacts
Seal a public accusation moment with paradox guard

skills.name: Tiered Memory
skills.description: L1–L6 memory tier write discipline. Authority per layer, provenance required, FACT quality gate, L4→L6 promotion via seal hash only, TTL eviction. EUREKA search-first axiom: no naked 'I don't know' without the L1→L6 pipeline log. F11 enforced. ACTIVE.
examples: Write a fact to L4 with required provenance
Promote L4 to L6 only via sealed hash
Evict TTL-expired memory at L2 without losing L6 canon

Apply meta-critique to institutional pattern synthesis
